documentationScope: AI context cleanup and active-control consolidation
validatedActions: Removed the superseded contract-amendment file from the active tree.
Removed duplicate AI start-prompt and execution-rules files.
Removed invalid and superseded M0 evidence files; Git history retains traceability.
Reduced AGENTS.md to authority, startup, scope, non-negotiable controls, and evidence rules.
Reduced START_HERE, PHASE_STATUS, HANDOFF, and PROJECT_MEMORY so each has one distinct purpose.
Replaced the mixed historical decision log with active approved decisions only.
Simplified README and SECURITY.md to indexes and product overview rather than duplicate specifications.
Removed pull-request and commit history from ENVIRONMENT_AND_INPUTS.md.
Condensed IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md around phase goals, required reading, and exit criteria.
Confirmed IMPLEMENTATION_CONTRACT.md remains the single binding contract and the product scope is unchanged.
unexecutedChecks: scan, copy, resume, reconciliation, reporting, publish, and production validation
limitations: This evidence validates documentation structure and active AI context only.
It does not justify Source Implementation Complete or Production Ready.
